messages.content: i want to build todo app

A Todo App sounds like a great project! Before we dive into the requirements, can you tell me a bit more about what motivated you to create this app? What specific needs or problems do you hope it will solve for your users?

(Active Listening: I'm trying to understand the context and goals of the project)

Also, is there a particular type of user in mind for this Todo App (e.g., personal use, professional use, household management)?
